articles.title: Antonelli fastest in Belgium FP3 as Hamilton crashes
articles.summary: Kimi Antonelli finished fastest in Free Practice 3 ahead of the Belgian Grand Prix from McLaren's Lando Norris, as Ferrari's Lewis Hamilton suffered a crash at the end of the session.

articles.summary: Fernando Alonso is the latest driver to be hit with a grid penalty at this weekend’s Belgian Grand Prix, following a trio of power unit changes between Friday practice and Saturday’s running.
